channel.title: Web Application Security on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Web Application Security on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA CySA+ (CS0-003): Vulnerability Management and Scanning
item.category: "CompTIA CySA+ Course" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Vulnerability Scanning" , "Risk Prioritization" , "Web Application Security" , "CVSS" , "Cybersecurity Analyst" , "Patch Management" , "Security Operations" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master vulnerability management for the CompTIA CySA+ CS0-003 exam. Learn scanning, CVSS and CVE, prioritization, web application vulnerabilities, software composition analysis, and secure baselines.

item.title: EC-Council CEH Course: Complete Study Guide for the Certified Ethical Hacker v13 Exam
item.category: "CEH Course" , "Certified Ethical Hacker" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "EC-Council Certification" , "Network Security" , "Web Application Security" , "Malware Analysis" , "Social Engineering" , "Cryptography"
item.description: A comprehensive EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) study course covering all 20 modules: ethical hacking methodology, footprinting, scanning, enumeration, system hacking, malware, web attacks, wireless attacks, cloud security, and cryptography.

item.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF) Configuration Checklist
item.category: "Web Application Security" , "Web Application Firewall" , "WAF Configuration" , "Web Security Best Practices" , "Application Protection" , "Cybersecurity" , "Web Application Defense" , "Security Guidelines" , "Web Application Attacks" , "WAF Deployment"
item.description: Discover best practices for configuring and deploying a web application firewall (WAF) to protect against common web attacks, ensuring robust security for your web applications.

item.title: Mastering Penetration Testing: Advanced Techniques and Real-World Examples for Cybersecurity Professionals
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Network Security" , "Web Application Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Social Engineering" , "Mobile Application Security" , "Cloud Security" , "Career Development"
item.description: Explore advanced techniques, tools, and real-world examples in mastering penetration testing to enhance your cybersecurity skills and career.

item.title: HackTheBox vs. TryHackMe: Which is Best for Learning Junior Penetration Testing?
item.category: "Technology" , "Cybersecurity" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Information Security" , "Digital Forensics" , "Network Security" , "Cyber Defense" , "Web Application Security" , "Cyber Threats"
item.description: Comparing the strengths and weaknesses of HackTheBox and TryHackMe to determine the best platform for junior penetration testing.
